Title: The Wizard of the Emerald City
Writer: Timofei Dekin, Roman Nepomnyashchiy, Aleksandr Volkov
Actors: Yuri Kolokolnikov, Svetlana Khodchenkova, Sofya Lebedeva
Plot: Swept by a hurricane into a magical and unknown world, Ellie and her new friends, the Scarecrow, the Tin Man and the Cowardly Lion, set off for the Emerald City in search of the Wizard who will grant their cherished wishes.
